---
title: "Papers"
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"     # one .qmd per paper (excludes this index)
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table
  fields: [date, title, description]
  filter-ui: true
---

Papers and preprints. Each entry opens the full PDF with a download link, and most
have a companion post that explains the ideas in plain language.
